name: steam-hide
description: Chrome/Vivaldi extension for hiding items on the Steam search page.

scripts.build:js: tsc --project tsconfig.json && tsc --target ES2020 --module none --lib DOM,ES2020 --strict --outFile build/content.js src/settings.ts src/content.ts && tsc --target ES2020 --module none --lib DOM,ES2020 --strict --outFile build/options.js src/settings.ts src/options.ts
